text: A Lament for Pharaoh King of Egypt

segments.text: In the twelfth year, on the first day of the twelfth month, the word of the LORD came to me, saying,

Son of man, take up a lament for Pharaoh king of Egypt and say to him:
‘You are like a lion among the nations; you are like a monster in the seas. You thrash about in your rivers, churning up the waters with your feet
and muddying the streams.’
segments.speaker: God

segments.text:
This is what the Lord GOD says:
‘I will spread My net over youwith a company of many peoples,
and they will draw you up in My net.
segments.speaker: Lord GOD

segments.text: I will abandon you on the land and hurl you into the open field. I will cause all the birds of the airto settle upon you, and all the beasts of the earthto eat their fill of you.
segments.speaker: Lord GOD

segments.text: I will put your flesh on the mountains and fill the valleys with your remains.
segments.speaker: Lord GOD

segments.text: I will drench the landwith the flow of your blood, all the way to the mountains—the ravines will be filled.
segments.speaker: Lord GOD

segments.text:
When I extinguish you, I will cover the heavens
and darken their stars. I will cover the sun with a cloud, and the moon will not give its light.
segments.speaker: Lord GOD

segments.text: All the shining lights in the heavensI will darken over you, and I will bring darknessupon your land,’declares the Lord GOD.
segments.speaker: Lord GOD

segments.text:
‘I will trouble the hearts of many peoples, when I bring about your destruction among the nations,
in countries you do not know.
segments.speaker: Lord GOD

segments.text:
I will cause many peoplesto be appalled over you, and their kings will shudder in horror because of youwhen I brandish My sword before them. On the day of your downfalleach of them will tremble
every moment for his life.’
segments.speaker: Lord GOD

segments.text:
For this is what the Lord GOD says:
‘The sword of the king of Babylonwill come against you!
segments.speaker: Lord GOD

segments.text:
I will make your hordes fallby the swords of the mighty,
the most ruthless of all nations. They will ravage the pride of Egypt and all her multitudes will be destroyed.
segments.speaker: Lord GOD

segments.text: I will slaughter all her cattlebeside the abundant waters. No human foot will muddy them again, and no cattle hooves will disturb them.
segments.speaker: Lord GOD

segments.text: Then I will let her waters settle and will make her rivers flow like oil,’declares the Lord GOD.
segments.speaker: Lord GOD

segments.text: ‘When I make the land of Egypt a desolation and empty it of all that filled it, when I strike down all who live there, then they will know that I am the LORD.’
segments.speaker: Lord GOD

segments.text: This is the lament they will chant for her; the daughters of the nations will chant it. Over Egypt and all her multitudes they will chant it, declares the Lord GOD.
segments.speaker: Lord GOD

segments.text: In the twelfth year, on the fifteenth day of the month, the word of the LORD came to me, saying,
Son of man, wail for the multitudes of Egypt, and consign her and the daughters of the mighty nations to the depths of the earth with those who descend to the Pit:
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: Whom do you surpass in beauty? Go down and be placed with the uncircumcised!
segments.speaker: Unknown

segments.text: They will fall among those slain by the sword. The sword is appointed! Let them drag her awayalong with all her multitudes.
segments.speaker: Unknown

segments.text: Mighty chiefs will speak from the midst of Sheolabout Egypt and her allies:‘They have come down and lie with the uncircumcised, with those slain by the sword.’
segments.speaker: Unknown

segments.text: Assyria is there with her whole company; her graves are all around her. All of them are slain, fallen by the sword.
segments.speaker: Unknown

segments.text: Her graves are set in the depths of the Pit, and her company is all around her grave. All of them are slain, fallen by the sword—those who once spread terrorin the land of the living.
segments.speaker: Unknown

segments.text: Elam is therewith all her multitudes around her grave. All of them are slain, fallen by the sword—those who went down uncircumcisedto the earth below, who once spread their terrorin the land of the living. They bear their disgracewith those who descend to the Pit.
segments.speaker: Unknown

segments.text:
Among the slain they preparea resting place for Elamwith all her hordes, with her graves all around her. All of them are uncircumcised, slain by the sword, although their terror was once spreadin the land of the living. They bear their disgracewith those who descend to the Pit.
They are placed among the slain.
segments.speaker: Unknown

segments.text:
Meshech and Tubal are therewith all their multitudes,
with their graves all around them. All of them are uncircumcised, slain by the sword, because they spread their terrorin the land of the living.
segments.speaker: Unknown

segments.text: They do not lie downwith the fallen warriors of old, who went down to Sheolwith their weapons of war, whose swords were placed under their heads, whose shields rested on their bones, although the terror of the mightywas once in the land of the living.
segments.speaker: Unknown

segments.text:
But you too will be shattered and lie down among the uncircumcised,
with those slain by the sword.
segments.speaker: Unknown

segments.text: Edom is there, and all her kings and princes, who despite their mightare laid among those slain by the sword. They lie down with the uncircumcised, with those who descend to the Pit.
segments.speaker: Unknown

segments.text: All the leaders of the north and all the Sidonians are there; they went down in disgrace with the slain, despite the terror of their might. They lie uncircumcisedwith those slain by the sword and bear their shamewith those who descend to the Pit.
segments.speaker: Unknown

segments.text: Pharaoh will see them and be comforted over all his multitude—Pharaoh and all his army, slain by the sword, declares the Lord GOD.
segments.speaker: Lord GOD

segments.text:
For I will spread My terrorin the land of the living, so that Pharaoh and all his multitudewill be laid to rest among the uncircumcised,
with those slain by the sword, declares the Lord GOD.
segments.speaker: Lord GOD
